LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ROYAL REFERRAL, L.L.C. AND EILEEN BURKE'S (RE-NOTICE) MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT; TO RECALL AND SET ASIDE ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT, WRIT OF EXECUTION AND NOTICES OF LEVY; AND TO RELEASE PENDING LIENS (C.C.P. 473(B)). COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE MOTION OF ROYAL REFERRAL FOR MANDATORY RELIEF UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 473 IS GRANTED. BURKE MAY NOT RELY ON THE MANDATORY PROVISION OF C.C.P. SECTION 473 BECAUSE SHE WAS REPRESENTING HERSELF. SEE ESTHER B. V CITY OF LOS ANGELES (2008) 158 CAL APP 4TH 1093, 1100. THE COURT TREATS MS. BURKE'S MOTION AS ONE FOR DISCRETIONARY RELIEF AND GRANTS THE MOTION ON THE CONDITION THAT DEFENDANTS REMIT TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL THE SUM OF $2,337.50 IN FEES AND COSTS PLUS ANY ADDITIONAL FEES AND COSTS FOR APPEARING AT THE HEARING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Off Calendar Feb-02-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Off Calendar Jun-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS ROYAL REFERRAL, L.L.C. AND EILEEN BURKE'S (RE-NOTICE) MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT; TO RECALL AND SET ASIDE ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT, WRIT OF EXECUTION AND NOTICES OF LEVY; AND TO RELEASE PENDING LIENS (C.C.P. 473(B)).
APPEARANCES: EILEEN BURKE, ESQUIRE (BURKE LAW OFFICES, 415.578.3925) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THERE ARE NO OTHER APPEARANCES.
RULING: COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE MOTION OF ROYAL REFERRAL FOR MANDATORY RELIEF UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 473 IS GRANTED. BURKE MAY NOT RELY ON THE MANDATORY PROVISION OF C.C.P. SECTION 473 BECAUSE SHE WAS REPRESENTING HERSELF. SEE ESTHER B. V CITY OF LOS ANGELES (2008) 158 CAL APP 4TH 1093, 1100. THE COURT TREATS MS. BURKE'S MOTION AS ONE FOR DISCRETIONARY RELIEF AND GRANTS THE MOTION ON THE CONDITION THAT DEFENDANTS REMIT TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL THE SUM OF $2,337.50 IN FEES AND COSTS PLUS ANY ADDITIONAL FEES AND COSTS FOR APPEARING AT THE HEARING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
